Program

In the Routine Medical Analysis Laboratory,

important applications such as microscopy, culture, serology, immunological tests, routine biochemical analyzes, sterilization / disinfection / antisepsis applications, case studies, basic molecular tests are carried out in order to improve the medical skills of students who have reached the awareness that accurate, timely and effective diagnosis can directly direct the treatment / follow-up and aim to gain the following qualifications.

Routine Medical Analysis Laboratory Activities

Students are provided with the necessary infrastructure to become health professionals who can obtain results as soon as possible by providing laboratory quality control elements, produce effective solutions to the problems they encounter, comply with the relevant medical documentation processes and work organization, are compatible with teamwork, have responsibility, communicate effectively with patients, patients' relatives, physicians, laboratory specialists and other health professionals, and understand the principles of professional ethics.

Routine Medical Analysis Laboratory Use

Our students who mainly use the Routine Medical Analysis Laboratory are the students of the Medical Laboratory Techniques program and the aim of

the Medical Laboratory Techniques

Program

;

Has internalized the concepts and principles related to his/her subject,

Based on universal science and education in the field of medical laboratory services,

To be able to combine theoretical knowledge with practice,

To be able to use the methods related to the data needed for diagnosis (Microbiological, Biochemical, Cytogenetic, etc.),

Obtaining and organizing diagnostic data,

It has features that can be shared and made available in accordance with the purpose/ethical rules,

By learning the organizational chart in the health sector, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Pathology, Parasitology, Hematology, Serology, Serology, Medical Biology and Genetics tests can take an active role in the organizations and research laboratories in universities, pharmaceutical industry laboratories, public health institutes, medical and health centers, medical laboratories and medical products R & D studies, production, marketing to the sector to train qualified personnel who can work.
